creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Hi. I am unable to clone main and quarterly branches of the ports repository with gitup. Cloning src repositories works.

I do get following output.
```
# gitup ports

# Scanning local repository...
# Host: git.freebsd.org
# Port: 443
# Repository Path: /ports.git
# Target Directory: /usr/ports
# Want: 1e6aee300ac1654e4f27c514904b10bf3161642d
# Branch: main
gitup: fetch_pack: malformed pack data:

: Inappropriate file type or format
```

Thanks.
